title: Ceramic Crocks
description: A primitive storage mod. Crocks made of clay.
body:
### Ceramic Crocks - A Primitive Storage Mod

![Display of the different crocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaa4739318f2a2c8eb6da5a460ccb5da26a84cff.png)

A simple primitive storage mod. Inspired by TFC and Vintage Story.

Easy to use, craft with clay, then throw in a furnace.

You can color them by sneak-right-clicking a crock with a dye in hand (Configurable).

Also as a super special mega bonus, the crocks keep their inventory on breaking.

_Small Crock:_

![Small Crock Recipe ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c6459db85cba4c24b13133d2a6cc51614d0da52.png)

_Large Crock:_

![Large Crock Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/728d267c593f99a059ced2aa14cd4746b64e7fb7.png)

_Sample Interface:_

![Sample Interface](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f18b2677773378cc5e73e1a0ad21ba5b52ea56ab.png)

_Keeps contents on breaks, and gives you some info on mouseover:_

![Mousover Tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e3eca6975a02ab980c4491631925496c0e01602.png)
